name: Soup Royale (Aka Napkin Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, grated Parmesan cheese, salt, and nutmeg. Stir in the lightly beaten eggs.
2. Cut the butter into small pieces and add it to the mixture. Mix until well combined.
3. Wet a cloth napkin, squeeze out any excess water, and spread it flat on a clean surface.
4. Spoon the cheese mixture into the center of the napkin. Bring up the ends of the napkin and tie together securely to form a tight bag.
5. Place the bag into a soup kettle containing 10 cups of chicken and beef broth.
6. Bring the contents to a boil, then cover and simmer for 2 hours.
7. Remove the bag from the broth and let it cool to room temperature.
8. Untie the bag and remove the hardened mixture from the napkin. Cut the mixture into half-inch slices.
9. Add the sliced pieces back into the broth. Reheat the broth, then add the cubes and continue boiling for an additional 10 minutes.
10. Serve hot.
